title: Initialize frontend scaffold
description: Create the initial single-page project scaffold.
acceptance_criteria: Frontend scaffold exists.
verification_steps: Inspect root project files.

title: Establish section skeleton
description: Create the single-page information architecture.
acceptance_criteria: Required sections exist.
verification_steps: Inspect section anchors and layout.

title: Define initial visual baseline
description: Create initial tokens and styling baseline.
acceptance_criteria: Shared styling system exists.
verification_steps: Inspect core styles.

title: Add placeholder content
description: Populate the first version with placeholder content.
acceptance_criteria: No major section is empty.
verification_steps: Inspect content coverage.

title: Add accessibility and responsiveness
description: Ensure the initial page is usable across devices.
acceptance_criteria: Layout remains usable on mobile.
verification_steps: Inspect mobile behavior.

title: Document local run instructions
description: Document how to run and resume the project.
acceptance_criteria: README contains local run steps.
verification_steps: Inspect README.

title: Define premium visual direction
description: Define the higher-end visual system for S002.
acceptance_criteria: One clear art direction is visible.
verification_steps: Inspect palette, type, and surfaces.

title: Redesign hero centerpiece
description: Make the hero more visually distinctive.
acceptance_criteria: Hero has a memorable focal motif.
verification_steps: Inspect hero composition.

title: Upgrade section atmosphere
description: Improve layout rhythm and background atmosphere.
acceptance_criteria: Page feels more editorial than S001.
verification_steps: Inspect section flow and surfaces.

title: Add restrained motion polish
description: Introduce intentional motion without scope creep.
acceptance_criteria: Motion is present and restrained.
verification_steps: Inspect reveal and hover behavior.

title: Close polish gaps and document decisions
description: Close finish gaps and record visual decisions.
acceptance_criteria: Notes capture the design decisions.
verification_steps: Inspect notes and runtime polish.

title: Remove card-heavy section treatments
description: Replace dominant card framing with integrated composition.
acceptance_criteria: Major sections no longer rely on card shells.
verification_steps: Inspect about, projects, and contact layout.

title: Rework the color palette
description: Create a richer premium-artistic palette.
acceptance_criteria: Palette is materially improved over S002.
verification_steps: Inspect updated color roles and contrast.

title: Translate user interests into interaction motifs
description: Use computer science, AI agent, travel, and photography as interaction inspiration without feature creep.
acceptance_criteria: At least three interests are reflected in tasteful motifs.
verification_steps: Inspect final interactions and generator notes.

title: Strengthen motion choreography
description: Align reveal, hover, and scroll behavior with the new composition.
acceptance_criteria: Motion supports composition rather than isolated cards.
verification_steps: Inspect choreography and reduced-motion behavior.

title: Document composition strategy
description: Record composition, palette, and interaction decisions for evaluation.
acceptance_criteria: Notes capture composition and palette rationale.
verification_steps: Inspect generator notes and run instructions.

title: Repair hero-to-page visual continuity
description: Remove the cold rectangular break in the PERSONAL EDITION area and unify hero/background logic into one continuous atmospheric canvas.
acceptance_criteria: Hero no longer reads as a cold isolated block floating on a warm page.
Warm paper base and cool accents are blended into one continuous page-level composition.
verification_steps: Inspect hero and first viewport for color seam removal.
Confirm cool tones appear as light, glow, or interaction feedback rather than hard background slabs.
notes: Implemented in Sprint S004 by generator.

title: Upgrade the page-wide atmospheric palette and deep anchor system
description: Apply the new palette roles: bone-white parchment base, slate-charcoal ink, mist-teal cool accent, muted brass warm accent, and a deep green-gray or deep navy anchor.
acceptance_criteria: The palette uses the requested warm paper base with controlled cool and warm accents.
Deep anchor tones are present to stabilize the composition and improve premium contrast.
verification_steps: Inspect token or stylesheet variables for the new palette roles.
Confirm large hard cool panels are removed and cool tones are relegated to local light fields or feedback.
notes: Implemented in Sprint S004 by generator.

title: Dissolve residual panel containers into editorial annotations and track systems
description: Break down the remaining right-side white frame and lower grid into marginal notes, floating tags, numbering systems, trace lines, and annotation layers instead of boxed panels.
acceptance_criteria: The right-side white frame and lower supporting structures are absorbed into one unified editorial system.
Page support elements read as annotations, labels, and trajectories rather than boxes.
verification_steps: Inspect hero right rail and lower visual system for the absence of residual boxy panels.
Confirm support information uses labels, note markers, lines, or overlays instead of card containers.
notes: Implemented in Sprint S004 by generator.

title: Build AI Agent and travel interaction language into the page canvas
description: Turn AI Agent and travel interests into explicit interaction systems: an interactive agent field with local rerouting and pulse communication, plus route traces, arcs, coordinates, and scroll-triggered trajectory language.
acceptance_criteria: AI Agent is represented by an interactive field with local path recalculation or pulse propagation behavior.
Travel is represented through route traces, coordinate markers, arc paths, or journey language tied to scroll or hover.
verification_steps: Interact with the hero or main visual and confirm localized agent-field response.
Inspect about or experience for route traces, trajectory arcs, or coordinate markers triggered by interaction or scroll.
notes: Implemented in Sprint S004 by generator.

title: Build photography, music, and finance interaction language into the page canvas
description: Express photography through viewfinder corners, focus lock, exposure sweep, and development-like entrances; music through rhythm-based reveal timing and underline cadence; finance through abstract signal lines, ticks, and market geometry without becoming a dashboard.
acceptance_criteria: Photography cues are visible in projects or the visual system through framing, focus, or exposure behavior.
Music is expressed through rhythmic title reveal, underline, or section-transition timing.
Finance knowledge appears as signal, ticker, or line-geometry language without turning the page into a data dashboard.
verification_steps: Inspect projects and title transitions for photography and rhythm-response behaviors.
Inspect visual overlays and geometry for finance-inspired signal language that remains abstract and premium.
notes: Implemented in Sprint S004 by generator.

title: Document the continuous-canvas system and preserve runtime quality
description: Record how hero continuity, palette roles, de-panelization, and all five interest-driven interaction languages were implemented while preserving single-page behavior and runtime stability.
acceptance_criteria: Generator notes explicitly describe the continuous canvas logic and the five interest mappings.
Run instructions remain valid and the redesign preserves single-page usability.
verification_steps: Inspect generator notes for continuity, palette, and interaction-language rationale.
Confirm the app still runs with documented commands after the redesign.
notes: Implemented in Sprint S004 by generator.
